title: Luffy Promises to Protect It
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Big Mom. The central beat is luffy promises to protect it.
scene: The scene focuses on luffy promises to protect it, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Big Mom shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...To return the TAMATEBAHO alone to us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What?! the box will explode if opened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why would you put explosives inside?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Have just returned to the Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: You picked a fight with big mom?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: UWAAAAH H!! You're too scary, nosepp- same!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My name's usop! And I'm sorry!

summary: Luffy Promises to Protect It. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
